top_signals.title: EU adopts 21st package of sanctions against Russia
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 23 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission welcomes the adoption by EU Member States of the 21st package of sanctions against Russia. The package further restricts Russia's ability to fund its illegal war and to carry out attacks on Ukrainian civilians and civilian infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former chief lending officer of Heritage State Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former chief lending officer of Heritage State Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026
top_signals.summary: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026

top_signals.title: GIC Posts Worst Five-Year Return Since 2013; US Still Top Market
top_signals.summary: Singaporean sovereign wealth fund GIC Pte reported its lowest five-year annualized return in more than a decade, after the giant investor reduced some of its risks earlier on and its bond holdings didn’t fully rebound.
